abstracts.abstract: Authorizes the city of Pawtucket to issue not more than $2,500,000 general obligation bonds and notes to finance the improvement and replacement of road safety infrastructure and traffic control devices.

bill.title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE CITY OF PAWTUCKET TO PROVIDE FOR THE  IMPROVEMENT AND REPLACEMENT OF ROAD SAFETY INFRASTRUCTURE  AND TRAFFIC CONTROL DEVICES IN THE CITY OF PAWTUCKET AND AUTHORIZING THE FINANCING THEREOF, INCLUDING THE ISSUE OF NOT MORE THAN $2,500,000 BONDS AND NOTES THEREFOR, TO FUND THE CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROGRAM FOR THE TWO FISCAL YEARS 2028 AND 2029

posted_text:
🚗 RI H8593 — Pawtucket to Borrow Funds for Road Safety

The city of Pawtucket is authorized to issue up to $2.5 million in bonds to upgrade roads and traffic signals, aiming to improve safety for drivers and pedestrians.

June 23, 2026: Signed by Governor.

🔗 Read the full bill: https://webserver.rilegislature.gov/BillText26/HouseText26/H8593.htm

#Transportation #RhodeIsland #Legislation #StateLegislature #CivicTech
